title: “Attention Is All You Need” introduces the Transformer
summary: The Transformer architecture replaces recurrence with attention, becoming the backbone of modern frontier models.

title: GPT-3 demonstrates few-shot learning at scale
summary: A 175B-parameter model shows that scaling unlocks broad few-shot capability, catalyzing the scaling era.

title: ChatGPT launches
summary: Conversational access to a capable LLM drives the fastest consumer-product adoption on record and mainstreams AI.

title: GPT-4 released
summary: A large multimodal model posts human-level results on many professional and academic benchmarks.

title: Frontier models go natively multimodal and real-time
summary: Real-time voice, vision, and text in a single model push assistants toward agentic, multimodal interaction.

title: Inference-time reasoning models emerge
summary: Models that 'think' with extended test-time compute sharply improve math, coding, and science benchmarks.

title: Efficient open-weight reasoning models close the gap
summary: Strong open-weight reasoning models trained at lower cost intensify competition and broaden access.
